CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_IP when a proximity match triggers an extraordinary circumstances keyword (e.g., WETLANDS, FLOODPLAIN, critical habitat) as defined in NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt. When true, the CE Screener will not recommend a CE pathway — the project requires at minimum an EA.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True if GIS proximity check found extraordinary circumstances that preclude a CE determination.
CustomField.label: Extraordinary Circumstances (GIS)
